model_output_solution_source:
PAT_LEN = 15
MASK64 = (1 << 64) - 1
FNV_OFFSET = 1469598103934665603
FNV_PRIME = 1099511628211


def run(rows: list[str]) -> int:
    h = FNV_OFFSET
    mask = MASK64
    prime = FNV_PRIME

    for row in rows:
        v = 0
        if len(row) == PAT_LEN:
            c0 = ord(row[0])
            c1 = ord(row[1])
            c2 = ord(row[2])
            c3 = ord(row[3])
            c4 = ord(row[4])
            c5 = ord(row[5])
            c6 = ord(row[6])
            c7 = ord(row[7])
            c8 = ord(row[8])
            c9 = ord(row[9])
            c10 = ord(row[10])
            c11 = ord(row[11])
            c12 = ord(row[12])
            c13 = ord(row[13])
            c14 = ord(row[14])

            if (
                65 <= c0 <= 90 and
                65 <= c1 <= 90 and
                48 <= c2 <= 57 and
                48 <= c3 <= 57 and
                48 <= c4 <= 57 and
                48 <= c5 <= 57 and
                c6 == 45 and
                ((48 <= c7 <= 57) or (65 <= c7 <= 70)) and
                ((48 <= c8 <= 57) or (65 <= c8 <= 70)) and
                ((48 <= c9 <= 57) or (65 <= c9 <= 70)) and
                ((48 <= c10 <= 57) or (65 <= c10 <= 70)) and
                ((48 <= c11 <= 57) or (65 <= c11 <= 70)) and
                ((48 <= c12 <= 57) or (65 <= c12 <= 70)) and
                ((48 <= c13 <= 57) or (65 <= c13 <= 70)) and
                ((48 <= c14 <= 57) or (65 <= c14 <= 70))
            ):
                v = c2 + c7

        h ^= v + 1
        h = (h * prime) & mask

    return h
